ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user created their account */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's account is verified */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the tweet was posted */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date and time when the tweet was posted */,
  "is_reply" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the tweet is a reply */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the original tweet author if this tweet is a reply */,
  "in_reply_to_tweet_id" TEXT /* Tweet ID of the original tweet if this tweet is a reply */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet content */,
  "tweet_type" TEXT /* Type of tweet (e.g., original, retweet, quote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric entry */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being tracked */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the tweet received */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet received */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the tweet received */,
  "engagements" INTEGER /* Total engagements (favorites, retweets, replies) the tweet received */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the tweet */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date and time when the engagement metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that was analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet content */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Identified topic or category of the tweet */,
  "entity_mentions" TEXT /* List of entities mentioned in the tweet */,
  "keyword_extraction" TEXT /* List of keywords extracted from the tweet */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_analysis_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to define the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_segment_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who belongs to the segment */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment the user belongs to */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_segment_membership_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES user_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_segment_membership_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topic_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership entry */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that belongs to the topic */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the tweet belongs to */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tweet was assigned to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topic_membership_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topic_membership_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES tweet_topics ("topic_id")
)
